office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: House Speaker Laurie Jinkins faces repeat candidate Carole Sue Braaten, whose approved sources provide no detailed policy platform.

candidates.summary: Braaten is a repeat legislative candidate whose approved sources provide no detailed policy platform.
highlights: Appeared on the district's 2024 state-Senate primary ballot [S2]
The approved sources provide no sufficiently detailed policy platform [S1][S2]

experience.basis: She is a repeat candidate with no documented elected or institutional record.

candidates.summary: Jinkins is the incumbent House Speaker with an official record on progressive revenue, housing supply and tenant protections, and progressive social policy.
highlights: Serves as Speaker of the Washington House [S2]
Official work emphasizes progressive revenue and both housing supply and tenant protections [S2]

taxes.basis: Her official legislative work emphasizes progressive revenue.

housing.basis: Her official work combines housing-supply measures with tenant protections.

experience.basis: She is the incumbent House Speaker with a senior institutional leadership record.

social.basis: Her official work emphasizes reproductive and LGBTQ rights.
